chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-292 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 20-11-2025 Mr. Shamshad Ahmed Siyal, Advocate along with both petitioners. M/s Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G and Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy P.G a/w SIP Ghulam Asghar on behalf of SSP, Khairpur and ASI Ghulam Mustafa of P.S.T.M, Khan. Moharram Ali (respondent No.8) is present in person. **** Learned Law Officers file statement on behalf of respondent No.4, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioners. Respondent No.8 is present in person and submits that he is father of petitioner No.1 and they have asserted the marriage of petitioner No.1 with Nadir Ali (petitioner No.2), and further submits that both petitioners are cousins inter se. He undertakes that no harm shall be caused to the petitioners. Under the circumstances, this petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. Let a copy of this order be sent to SSP, Khairpur for compliance. JUDGE Ahmad
